name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes - 25 Jan 2024
body: [{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"OVERVIEW:","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Hello, Maropostians!! We have introduced a new feature in our SMS campaign module, which will help users download and view additional metrics of their sent campaigns. "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more, please read ahead!!"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"ENHANCEMENT:","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"We are now giving an "},{"text":"Export","bold":true},{"text":" option to Marketing Cloud users to download SMS campaign reports for "},{"text":"Total Send Campaigns","bold":true},{"text":". You can set the criteria you need to check in the report, such as its send status, keyword responses, etc. "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/smssend2.0685g00000JgyEtAAJ.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/smssend2.0685g00000JgyEtAAJ.png","name":"smssend2","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":938,"width":2880}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"By accessing such reports, you can identify the overall outcomes of your sent SMS messages that can help you make informed decisions to increase your SMS campaigns' deliverability and click rate."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/smssend3.0685g00000JgyEyAAJ.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/smssend3.0685g00000JgyEyAAJ.png","name":"smssend3","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1602,"width":2880}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To know more about the various parameters present in an SMS campaign, check out our "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/SMS-Campaign-Dashboard","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"SMS Campaign Dashboard","bold":true}]},{"text":" topic."}]}]}]
